Schema.description: Current task status per learner per task. Mutable — updated on each attempt.
Schema.condition: CloudFormation Condition: IsShadowStage (only provisioned when stage=shadow)

attributes.graded: Boolean — whether this task is scored
attributes.best_score: Number 0-100 — best quiz score across all attempts (quiz tasks only)
attributes.last_attempt_at: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent attempt
attributes.attempt_count: Number — total attempts for this task
attributes.updated_at: ISO 8601 timestamp of last record update
